title: An Act authorizing the City of Westfield to convert one seasonal off-premises all alcoholic beverages license to an annual license

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Pease of Westfield, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 5083) of Kelly W. Pease (with the approval of the mayor and city council) that the city of Westfield be authorized to convert one seasonal off-premises all alcoholic beverages license to an annual license in said city.  Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure

related_entities.name: committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 03/27/2026 from 09:00 AM-05:00 PM in Written Testimony Only
Accompanied a new draft, see H5346
